data_collected.source_quote: Square collects personal information including name, email, phone, address, and payment details for users and merchants.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Square collects data to process payments, prevent fraud, improve services, and provide AI functionality.

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Square will never sell information to third party vendors.

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: Square grants itself and its subsidiaries a worldwide right to use, reproduce, modify, and adapt your AI Content for their AI Products.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Square may share data with select third party service providers to enable functionality, for services provision, and legal compliance.

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Sensitive data is encrypted using industry-standard methods when transmitted over public networks using SSL and PGP.

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Square performs full data encryption within the card reader and encrypted storage on disk.

mfa_available.source_quote: Two-factor authentication and strong password controls are required for administrative access to systems.

independent_audits.source_quote: Square has achieved ISO 27001 certification. Square's card systems meet Level 1 PCI Data Security Standards.

gaps: user rights not clearly stated (access, delete, correct, portability, appeal)
GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Square has strong encryption practices (both in transit and at rest) and MFA requirements. ISO 27001 certified and PCI DSS Level 1 compliant. Notably lacks consumer user rights (access, delete, correct, portability, appeal) in policy. AI Content use by Square is significant with broad grant of rights to use, reproduce, modify and distribute for AI products.
